name: Sasacom - Malaysian most unsecured retailer was hacked and leaked a huge amount of confide
message: Who is Sasa.com  Zhengzhou Sasha Electronic Commerce Co. Ltd is a company that operates in the Retail industry.  Headquarters: F Block B Mp Industrial Centre 18 Ka Yip St 8/, Chaiwan, Jiangsu, China Website: www.sasa.com.hk Revenue: $428.7M
